case_title: SHAUNESSY JOHNSON VS. EARL'S ORGANIC PRODUCE ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100043262)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-12-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, SHAUNESSY AS TO DEFENDANT EARL'S ORGANIC PRODUCE DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-12-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-10-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-19-2018

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100043501), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, SHAUNESSY SERVED JUL-24-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE JUL-25-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT EARL'S ORGANIC PRODUCE
